titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 23: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 23. (A.R. No. 407 of 1903.) TIRUVĀMATTŪR, VILLUPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Abhirāmēśvara temple.

Records a gift of land after purchase by Nandipputtaṉ alias Śembiyaṉ Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, a resident of Paṉaippākkam in Kīḻāṉmūr-nāḍu, a division of Tirumuṉaippāḍi for burning one and a quarter perpetual lamp to the God of Tiruvāmāttūr, a dēvadānam in Vāvalūr-nāḍu. The tiruvuṇṇāḻigai-sabhaiyār, received the land from the donor. The donor purchased the land required from a lady Perumāṉaṅgaichchāṉi, the wife of Āridaṉ Nandi Nārāyaṇaṉ of Tiruvāmāttūr. It is also recorded that the said land had come to her possession as her maintenance and now she sold it through her guardian (mudukaṇ) Atiyā Saṉmadi^1^ to the above donor.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. VIII No. 723.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmar
kku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu vāvalūrnā
ṭṭut tevatāṉan tiruvāmāt
tūr Uṭaiya paramasvāmikaḷukku
t tirumuṉaippāṭik kiḻāṉmurnāṭṭu
cattup paṉaippākkattu Iru
nta nanti puttaṉāṉa cempiyaṉmu
ventaveḷāṉ vaitta nan=tā viḷakku Oṉ
ṟekāl Ivvoṉṟekālukku Ittevatāṉam
tiruvāmāttūr Āritaṉ nan=ti nārāyaṇaṉ brā
hmaṇi perumāṉaṅkaiccāṉi taṉakku Atiyā ca
ṉmaṉtiyai mutukaṇṇāka viṟṟa pūmi taṉ brā
hmaṇaṉai Ekkiṟa Epperppaṭṭa pūmiyilu
maṭamāṉa pulattiluṅ kaḷam ma pilum kā
ṟṟitam puḷiyaṅkollaiyilum Aḻiñcil
k kollaiyilum vaṭaveḷḷai cevilum mutā
ttattilum puṟattiluṅ kuṭṭieriyilu
ṅkāriluṅ kuḷaccevviluṅ kāṭṭakattilumThe right end is damaged.
pākkaṅkāṇiyiluṅ kuḷanelluḻāttiyilum pa
ḻai putiyilum maṟṟum Ivvūrkku van=ta nilam Ep
perppaṭṭa pūmiyum Ivaḷukkuc coṟukūṟṟukku
Itu Ikkuṭi Āritaṉ nanticāttaṉum vaṭukaṉ ti
teva riyum tevaṉ kovin=taṉun tevaṉ va
yaṉumāka Ivvaṉaivar vacca viḷakku Oṉṟe kā
neyattuk kurittāka viṭṭa
nantinārāyaṇaṉ brāhmaṇi perumāṉaṅkai
ccāṉi canmaṉtiyai mutukaṇṇāka viṟ
ṟa vi nanti puttaṉākiya cempiyaṉmuve
ntaveḷāṉe nāṉ vilaikoṇṭavaṇṇame Ippūmi koṇṭu Ittevatāṉantri
ruvāmattūrt tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhaiyom Ivvoṉṟe kāl viḷakkuc can=ti(ra)ātittaval Erikkakkaṭa
vārāka kkuṭutteṉ nanti puttiṉāki
ya cempiyaṉmuventaveḷāṉ vacca
viḷakku panma(ma)āheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
